summary: Changed the default web server port from 8120 to 31415 in main.py (UW_COURSE_PORT fallback), web/app.py (run_app port default), and README.md. The UW_COURSE_PORT env override is preserved.

verification.instructions_to_verify: 1. Run `uw-course` (or `python -m uw_course`) with no env vars and confirm it binds to 127.0.0.1:31415. 2. Run `UW_COURSE_PORT=9000 uw-course` and confirm it binds to port 9000 (override still works). 3. Verify README.md states the default URL is http://127.0.0.1:31415. Note: Flask is not installed in this container, so the server could not be launched here; source edits were confirmed via grep (no remaining 8120 references outside the task doc).
